action.reasoning: Observation: Best test balanced_accuracy remains 0.5606 from iteration 13 (domain-specific ensemble). Iteration 18 evaluated a strongly-regularized 3-backbone LR and scored 0.5311, below the best. The predict.py in workspace is truncated and must be rewritten completely. Analysis: We have ~42 minutes and 12 iterations left. The prototype classifier (checkpoints/prototypes.pkl) has never been successfully evaluated due to prior predict.py failures. It uses per-domain class prototypes on 3-backbone features — an extremely low-capacity method that is naturally balanced and may generalize better to the held-out L100 domain than logistic regression. Decision: Rewrite predict.py from scratch to be fully offline-safe (torchvision ResNet50, cached timm CLIP, cached transformers DINOv2) and support all checkpoint formats (sklearn LR, list ensembles, prototype dicts, weighted ensembles). Then immediately submit evaluation for the prototype model.
